metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the Claude Model Changer plugin and related tooling

plugins.name: claude-model-changer
plugins.description: Automatic Claude model routing (haiku/sonnet/opus) based on task complexity. 28 task categories, 4 hooks, multi-language detection (EN/HU/DE), anomaly detection, usage stats, and a /configure wizard. Saves cost on simple tasks; reserves opus for hard ones.
